bullets.text: Several countries are reporting hantavirus cases among passengers who disembarked from a previously virus-hit cruise ship, with some individuals now quarantining or receiving hospital care.
US President Donald Trump has criticized an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, stating that the current month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak."
Hundreds of Indigenous families in Mexico have been forced to flee their homes due to violence from drug gangs in Guerrero state.
The High Court will review a murder verdict that was changed to manslaughter for a Canberra man involved in his partner's death after she fell from his car.
The federal budget for 2026 is expected to be handed down today, with reports indicating a $45 billion improvement over four years and a focus on housing, productivity, and fuel security.
Two Australian citizens are facing new espionage charges, while four Australians have been evacuated from a virus-hit cruise ship and will quarantine in the Netherlands.
US President Donald Trump stated that the ceasefire in the US-Iran conflict is on 'life support' after rejecting Tehran's latest peace offer, ahead of his trip to China.
Gold prices increased as traders evaluated the ongoing deadlock in US-Iran negotiations, while emerging-market currencies weakened due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.

The conflict is significantly impacting the US economy, affecting businesses and consumers with hundreds of billions of dollars in lost output and potentially leading the US to consider suspending petrol tax.
